THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ARTORIACASTER-ARTORIA: A village girl hauling a staff taller than her courage... no. I know that light. The sword of selection has chosen itself a sword/-bearer.
Climb, then, little star. Hope alone never raised a single floor — but mortar mixed with tears holds surprisingly well.
Your staff keeps whispering in the voice of a certain flower magus. Tell him the Architect accepted no consultants on this build.
Raise your forged star against me if you must, sword/-bearer. The Spire has outlasted prettier dawns than yours.
